title: caladenia reptans subsp. reptans
intro: Caladenia reptans subsp. reptans, also known as the reptant spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to Western Australia. As a medicinal plant, Caladenia reptans subsp. reptans has been used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Caladenia reptans subsp. reptans can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
